message:
test: add 37 extended proptest property tests for connector_governor

Covers QueueBackpressure (enqueue/dequeue invariants, peak tracking,
throttle/reject zone consistency, snapshot), TokenBucket (consume_n,
with_initial clamping, time_until_available), AdaptiveBackoff (delay
capping, success reset, failure counter), GovernorDecision constructor
invariants, GovernorVerdict/Reason Display+serde stability, governor
evaluation priority (backpressure > backoff > rate > quota > budget),
lazy connector creation, quota/cost budget extended properties, and
serde roundtrips with f64 tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
